title: BKNMU B.Sc Time Table 2026

detail.title: BKNMU B.Sc Time Table 2026
detail.short_info: Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University has released the BKNMU B.Sc Nursing Time Table 2026 for Semester 1 and Semester 3 theory exams. Download the official exam schedule PDF online.

content.text: Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University has officially released the B.Sc Time Table 2026 for B.Sc (Nursing) Semester 1 and Semester 3 Theory Examinations to be held in May 2026. The timetables are available for Regular and Remedial students. Students can now download the official BKNMU B.Sc Nursing Time Table 2026 and check their exam schedule from the university website.

sections.heading: BKNMU B.Sc Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: BKNMU has released the theory examination timetable for B.Sc Nursing programme. The schedules cover both first semester and third semester students for the May 2026 examinations.

links.label: B.Sc. (Nursing) Sem-1 (Reg.-Rem.) & B.Sc. (Nursing) Sem-3 (Reg.-Rem.) Exam Center List (MAY-2026)

sections.heading: How to Download BKNMU B.Sc Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the BKNMU B.Sc Time Table 2026 from the official university website by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official website of BKNMU.
Go to the News & Events or Time Table section.
Look for the B.Sc Nursing Semester 1 or Semester 3 May 2026 timetable link.
Click on the respective semester timetable.
The PDF will open in a new tab. Download and save the file.
Take a printout for easy reference during your exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in BKNMU B.Sc Time Table 2026
